skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects all allies. Damage to Parts ▲ 24.26% for 15 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: trigger passive / target allies / buff partsDamagePct 24.26 dur 15
skill1.note: Inert vs the partless scope-lock boss; kept for fidelity / future parts consumer (caveat 3).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 3% of the skill user's ATK, stacks up to 5, lasts 30 sec.
skill1.note: Trigger 'destroys an enemy's part' never fires vs partless boss (genuinely-skippable class). ⚑3 BIG lever vs parts bosses: casterAtkPct 3×5=15% to ALL allies. Override deliberately REMOVED a prior optimistic permanent 15% casterAtkPct encoding that over-counted.

skill2.kitLine: Affects all allies. Damage to Parts ▲ 24.26% for 15 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger passive / target allies / buff partsDamagePct 24.26 dur 15
skill2.note: Kit text prints NO activation clause for skill2 (⚑2); encoded passive. Inert vs partless boss (caveat 3).

skill2.kitLine: Affects the enemy nearest to the crosshair. Deals 70.4% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec for 15 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger passive / target enemy / dot atkPct 70.4 dur 999 interval 1 flavor sustained
skill2.note: Encoded per DoT-overlap hard rule as ONE maintained passive instance (dur 999 = continuous steady-state), NOT a stacking per-trigger DoT. Printed 15s + unprinted re-activation cadence ⇒ maintained. 100% uptime is an INVENTED trigger (⚑2); real uptime unmeasured. FB on ticks = by timing (default, no noFb). 'final ATK' read as caster ATK.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Sustained Damage ▲ 20.32% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0]: trigger burstCast / target allies / buff sustainedDamagePct 20.32 dur 10
burst.note: Feeds her own S2 DoT and any DoT teammates. Plain buff, no snapshot issue.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Damage Taken ▲ 32.23% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: trigger burstCast / target enemy / buff damageTakenPct 32.23 dur 10
burst.note: Big team-wide lever; blast radius is TEAM-WIDE (sim-battery diff before board claims). Encoded on enemy target.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: part-destroy ATK stacks (3% caster ATK ×5 to all allies) are inert vs a partless boss and NOT modeled — big hidden lever on parts bosses.
documentedConfounds.why: Within the partless scope-lock boss the trigger never fires, so it cannot move this unit's sim number; it is a genuine (documented) gap only on parts bosses, outside current scope.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: sustained DoT modeled as 100%-uptime maintained (one passive instance) — the kit text prints no activation clause; real uptime is unmeasured.
documentedConfounds.why: If real activation has gaps (e.g. gated on attacking/charge), both the S2 DoT damage and the sustained-damage feed over-count proportionally. This is the primary unmeasured lever on her personal contribution.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1/skill2: Damage to Parts ▲ 24.26% buffs are inert vs the partless boss (kept for fidelity).
documentedConfounds.why: partsDamagePct has no target to act on against a partless boss, so these blocks contribute zero either way; they cannot open a gap in this scope.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 cadence tuple: AR pulls/s + reloadFrames 81 + rolling-reload unverified (datamine estimate; 60 ammo empties in ~5s at class rate, plausible).
documentedConfounds.why: Unverified fire/reload cadence drives her personal normal-attack damage and burst-gauge timing; if wrong it shifts her own damage share. Secondary contributor (she is primarily a buffer) but unmeasured.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑3 part-destroy stacks: casterAtkPct 3×5=15% to ALL allies vs parts bosses (same mechanic as caveat 1).
documentedConfounds.why: Duplicate of the skill1 caveat; inert in the partless scope, large only on parts bosses. Documented skip, not a silent drop.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Rosanna: Chic Ocean (AR/Wind/Supporter/B2) as a parts-support buffer whose kit value is largely INERT against the partless scope-lock boss, so she is expected to look weak here (faithful, not a bug). Modeled: S1a/S2a partsDamagePct 24.26 buffs (kept for fidelity though inert), S2b sustained DoT as a single maintained 100%-uptime passive instance (dur 999) per the DoT-overlap hard rule, and burst as team-wide sustainedDamagePct 20.32 + boss damageTakenPct 32.23. Deliberately skipped (unmodeled) the S1b part-destroy ATK stacks — never fire vs partless boss, and the override explicitly removed a prior over-counting permanent 15% casterAtkPct encoding. Key not-yet-faithful spots: skill2 has NO printed activation clause so the 100% uptime is an invented trigger (⚑2, the main HOT risk), and fire cadence is an unverified datamine estimate (⚑1). Whole file is a PARSER BASELINE / HYPOTHESIS, never fielded, with no board data.
